ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date of the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., USPS, UPS) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the platform */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Segment of the customer (e.g., VIP, regular) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., electronics, clothing) */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., shipping, billing) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., USPS, UPS) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "carrier_tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number provided by the carrier */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "shipping_status" TEXT /* Status of the shipping (e.g., in transit, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the payment transaction */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used (e.g., PayPal, Stripe) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_city_name FOREIGN KEY ("city_name") REFERENCES addresses ("city")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hours" (
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hour */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (e.g., 1-24) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "minutes" (
  "minute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each minute */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the hour (e.g., 1-60) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("minute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grouped" (
  "grouped_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grouped product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "grouped_name" TEXT /* Name of the grouped product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grouped_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grouped_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_addresses" (
  "customer_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_addresses_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., sales team, customer support, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order related to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., order update, shipping update) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
